testcases.input: dungeon = [[-2,-3,3],[-5,-10,1],[10,30,-5]] Output: 7 Explanation: The initial health of the knight must be at least 7 if he follows the optimal path: RIGHT-> RIGHT -> DOWN -> DOWN.
